title: lobelia gloria-montis subsp. gloria-montis
intro: Lobelia gloria-montis subsp. gloria-montis, also known as Gloria Montis lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to the high mountains of the Sierra Nevada in California. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia gloria-montis subsp. gloria-montis include relief from coughs and colds, reduction of pain and inflammation, and potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
